images.caption:
Figure 1.Overview of the Stream framework.
Starting from heterogeneous rich-media sources (web pages, live streams, and short videos),
Phase 1 (SSI) extracts atomic interaction signals𝒳={Qu,Ra,Pq​a,St​a​g,Ia​c​c}\mathcal{X}=\{Q_{u},R_{a},P_{qa},S_{tag},I_{acc}\}via denoising, alignment, and metadata extraction.
Phase 2 (APS) builds paired role-grounded personas, including User Persona Modeling (PuP_{u}) and Agent Persona Modeling (PaP_{a}).
Phase 3 (CB) constructs a Conversational Blueprint (BB) that specifies stage-wise rhythm, key nodes, coping strategies, and feasible dialogue paths.
Phase 4 (IDG) performs interactive multi-agent generation with RAG support and dialogue filtering, producing the final dataset𝒟={(Pu,Pa,B,H)}\mathcal{D}=\{(P_{u},P_{a},B,H)\}.

Figure 3.Radar visualization of intrinsic quality scores comparing Open Data (Baseline) andStreamDial (Hybrid)under three LLM judges (Qwen3-Max, GPT-5.2, Gemini3-Pro). Each axis corresponds to one evaluation dimension. The exact numeric values used to plot this figure are reported in AppendixB.
